name: Boyuan Jiang
motto: When the seagulls follow the trawler, it's because they think sardines will be thrown into the sea.
selfDescription: A passionate computer science student with a love for building innovative solutions. Always eager to learn new technologies and tackle challenging problems.
openingStyle: I may seem a little reserved at first, but I open up quickly when the conversation touches something real.
The easiest way to get to know me is through books, travel stories, product thinking, or long conversations about how people make choices.
I value sincerity and detail, so I usually connect more through depth than through noise.
If you want a shortcut, talk to me about hiking, swimming, traveling, or Dream of the Red Chamber.
